message:
test: add 13 unit tests to analysis/advanced.rs

advanced.rs: 14→27 tests covering bfs_downstream (no dependents, transitive),
top_k_set edge cases (all closed, independent issues), coverage_set (no
critical paths), k_paths (all closed, single edge), parallel_cut (no deps),
parallel_gain (no open, two independent chains), simulate_edge_removal
(component splitting), config defaults, and usage hints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
